{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Procurement Officer",
  "description": "Phillips Outsourcing Limited has been in existence for over 16 years. We have a vast experience in the outsourcing business as we currently manage resources for major clients in all sectors of the Nigerian economy. In addition, our prolific manpower cuts across the 36 states in Nigeria. After successfully gaining ground in all the 36 states of the federation, we are gradually spreading our tentacles to other African Nations. We are currently registered to also do business in Ghana. Our framework is developed to fully support the businesses of our clients, ensuring continuous improvement of the outsourced services. This ultimately thrusts our clients to achieve their business objectives.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Procurement Officer

Job Location: Ikoyi, Lagos
Employment Type: Full Time
Industry: Real Estate (Commercial Real Estate)

Responsibilities


	Procurement Strategy &amp; Cost Optimization&nbsp;
	Develop and implement procurement policies and strategies to align with business objectives.
	Identify and negotiate with suppliers for cost-effective purchasing while ensuring quality standards.
	Source and procure food ingredients, beverages, packaging, and operational supplies in line with approved specifications.
	Identify and onboard reliable vendors, ensuring competitive pricing and consistent quality
	Negotiate contracts and pricing agreements to achieve cost efficiencies
	Secure competitive pricing and favorable contract terms while eliminating substandard products.
	Ensure timely procurement of goods and services by maintaining efficient order processing and delivery schedules.
	Monitor and assess supplier performance, tracking delivery timelines, product quality, and contractual compliance.
	Ensure vendors comply with food safety, quality, and delivery standards
	Resolve supply chain issues proactively to avoid operational disruptions
	Conduct market research to identify new sourcing opportunities and industry trends.
	Ensure regulatory compliance in all procurement activities.
	Ensure all procured items meet food safety, hygiene, and regulatory standards
	Work closely with HSE and kitchen teams to ensure compliance with internal and statutory requirements
	Maintain accurate procurement documentation and audit trails
	Maintain comprehensive records of all procurement activities, including purchase orders, supplier contracts, pricing agreements, and vendor performance reports.


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s degree in Procurement, Supply Chain Management, Business Administration, or a related field.
	5 years of experience in procurement, supply chain, or vendor management.
	Strong knowledge of procurement regulations, cost analysis, and contract negotiation.
	Experience in real estate, hospitality, or corporate procurement is a plus.
	Excellent problem-solving, and communication (written and oral) skills.
	Good computer skills: MS Excel, MS Word &amp; Power Point, Zoom.
	Excellent negotiation and vendor management skills.
	Strong analytical and problem-solving abilities.
	Proficiency in procurement software and reporting tools.
	Ability to work in a fast-paced environment and manage multiple priorities.


Salary
N500,000 / Month (Net)",
  "datePosted": "2026-05-18",
  "validThrough": "2026-06-02",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "Phillips OutSourcing"
    
  },

Procurement Officer Job at Phillips Outsourcing Limited




        
    

        
        Phillips Outsourcing Limited has been in existence for over 16 years. We have a vast experience in the outsourcing business as we currently manage resources for major clients in all sectors of the Nigerian economy. In addition, our prolific manpower cuts across the 36 states in Nigeria. After successfully gaining ground in all the 36 states of the federation, we are gradually spreading our tentacles to other African Nations. We are currently registered to also do business in Ghana. Our framework is developed to fully support the businesses of our clients, ensuring continuous improvement of the outsourced services. This ultimately thrusts our clients to achieve their business objectives.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Job Position: Procurement Officer

Job Location: Ikoyi, Lagos
Employment Type: Full Time
Industry: Real Estate (Commercial Real Estate)

Responsibilities


	Procurement Strategy & Cost Optimization 
	Develop and implement procurement policies and strategies to align with business objectives.
	Identify and negotiate with suppliers for cost-effective purchasing while ensuring quality standards.
	Source and procure food ingredients, beverages, packaging, and operational supplies in line with approved specifications.
	Identify and onboard reliable vendors, ensuring competitive pricing and consistent quality
	Negotiate contracts and pricing agreements to achieve cost efficiencies
	Secure competitive pricing and favorable contract terms while eliminating substandard products.
	Ensure timely procurement of goods and services by maintaining efficient order processing and delivery schedules.
	Monitor and assess supplier performance, tracking delivery timelines, product quality, and contractual compliance.
	Ensure vendors comply with food safety, quality, and delivery standards
	Resolve supply chain issues proactively to avoid operational disruptions
	Conduct market research to identify new sourcing opportunities and industry trends.
	Ensure regulatory compliance in all procurement activities.
	Ensure all procured items meet food safety, hygiene, and regulatory standards
	Work closely with HSE and kitchen teams to ensure compliance with internal and statutory requirements
	Maintain accurate procurement documentation and audit trails
	Maintain comprehensive records of all procurement activities, including purchase orders, supplier contracts, pricing agreements, and vendor performance reports.


Requirements


	Bachelor’s degree in Procurement, Supply Chain Management, Business Administration, or a related field.
	5 years of experience in procurement, supply chain, or vendor management.
	Strong knowledge of procurement regulations, cost analysis, and contract negotiation.
	Experience in real estate, hospitality, or corporate procurement is a plus.
	Excellent problem-solving, and communication (written and oral) skills.
	Good computer skills: MS Excel, MS Word & Power Point, Zoom.
	Excellent negotiation and vendor management skills.
	Strong analytical and problem-solving abilities.
	Proficiency in procurement software and reporting tools.
	Ability to work in a fast-paced environment and manage multiple priorities.


Salary
N500,000 / Month (Net)    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

Job Position: Supply Chain Manager - Restaurant

Job Location: Victoria Island, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking for a results-driven Supply Chain Manager to oversee procurement, inventory, vendor management, and logistics.
	The ideal candidate will ensure consistent availability of high-quality ingredients, optimize costs, and maintain efficient supply chain operations across outlets.
	You will work closely with kitchen and operations teams, manage suppliers, and implement effective inventory and demand planning systems while ensuring food safety compliance.


Key Responsibilities


	Manage procurement and supplier relationships
	Monitor inventory and prevent shortages/overstocking
	Negotiate pricing for cost efficiency
	Coordinate logistics and timely deliveries
	Ensure food safety and quality standards


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s degree in Business Administration, Procurement, Supply Chain Management or a related field
	Minimum of 5&ndash;7 years of experience in Supply chain management, bid, or procurement roles
	Strong understanding of procurement processes, tendering, and contract management
	Experience in restaurant or hospitality supply chain management
	Strong negotiation and analytical skills
	Knowledge of inventory and demand planning systems
	Excellent negotiation, analytical, and documentation skills
	Proficiency in MS Office (Excel, Word, PowerPoint); ERP experience is an advantage
	Professional certifications will be an added advantage


Salary
N800,000 gross monthly

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should possess should send their CV to: cctalentservices@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note: Only applicants with relevant experience will be contacted.",

Supply Chain Manager - Restaurant Job at Citadel HR Consulting




        
    

        
        Citadel HR Consulting - Our client, a group of fine dining restaurants (Zkitchen Restaurants), is recruiting to fill the position below

Job Position: Supply Chain Manager - Restaurant

Job Location: Victoria Island, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking for a results-driven Supply Chain Manager to oversee procurement, inventory, vendor management, and logistics.
	The ideal candidate will ensure consistent availability of high-quality ingredients, optimize costs, and maintain efficient supply chain operations across outlets.
	You will work closely with kitchen and operations teams, manage suppliers, and implement effective inventory and demand planning systems while ensuring food safety compliance.


Key Responsibilities


	Manage procurement and supplier relationships
	Monitor inventory and prevent shortages/overstocking
	Negotiate pricing for cost efficiency
	Coordinate logistics and timely deliveries
	Ensure food safety and quality standards


Requirements


	Bachelor’s degree in Business Administration, Procurement, Supply Chain Management or a related field
	Minimum of 5–7 years of experience in Supply chain management, bid, or procurement roles
	Strong understanding of procurement processes, tendering, and contract management
	Experience in restaurant or hospitality supply chain management
	Strong negotiation and analytical skills
	Knowledge of inventory and demand planning systems
	Excellent negotiation, analytical, and documentation skills
	Proficiency in MS Office (Excel, Word, PowerPoint); ERP experience is an advantage
	Professional certifications will be an added advantage


Salary
N800,000 gross monthly

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should possess should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note: Only applicants with relevant experience will be contacted.    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Hardware Engineer",
  "description": "Moniepoint Incorporated is a global business payments and banking platform and recently became QED Investors&rsquo; first investment in Africa. We are the partner of choice for over 600,000 businesses of all sizes, powering the dreams of SMBs and providing them with equal access to the tools they need to grow and scale.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Hardware Engineer

Job Location: Abuja

Job Purpose


	The Hardware Engineer ensures that our physical touchpoints&mdash;our POS terminals&mdash;are reliable, innovative, and always ready to serve our users.
	You&rsquo;ll be responsible for the full hardware lifecycle, from designing circuit boards to empowering our repair technicians with the mastery they need to keep our fleet running.
	You are the link between complex electronics and the everyday business owners who depend on them.


Key Responsibilities


	Design &amp; Innovation: Create electronic hardware circuits and PCB layouts that meet our high standards for performance and reliability.
	Product Mastery: Maintain and update the technical &quot;source of truth&quot; for our designs, including parts lists and bills of materials.
	Empower Others: Develop training and procedures that help our repair technicians work with precision and speed.
	Continuous Improvement: Create and update repair manuals that make complex fixes feel simple.
	Rigorous Testing: Conduct hands-on testing of products and tools, identifying design gaps and recommending modifications to make our hardware even better.
	Strategic Research: Analyse hardware specifications and market trends to determine the feasibility of new designs or modifications.
	Documentation: Keep detailed, accurate records of repair processes and results to help us learn from every issue identified.
	Collaborate: Work closely with technicians and other engineers to ensure our hardware strategy is aligned across the team.


Qualifications


	A Degree in Electrical / Electronics Engineering or a related field (or equivalent practical experience).
	3-5 years of experience as a hardware/electronics engineer
	Experience in terminal or electronics repair is a strong advantage.
	Strong analytical skills&mdash;you enjoy connecting the dots and solving puzzles.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office applications for documentation and tracking.
	Excellent attention to detail; you take pride in accuracy and keeping things tidy.
	A proactive, solution-oriented approach&mdash;you don&#39;t wait for instructions to make things better.


About you


	You&#39;re a Problem Solver: You enjoy the &quot;how&quot; and &quot;why&quot; behind hardware and love making things work.
	You&#39;re a Teacher: You enjoy sharing your knowledge and helping technicians grow their skills.
	You&#39;re Driven by Mastery: You don&#39;t settle for &quot;good enough&quot; and are always looking for ways to improve quality and efficiency.
	You&#39;re Human: You communicate clearly and treat your teammates with respect, regardless of their role.


What success looks like


	Reliability: Our hardware designs are stable, and POS terminals have high uptime in the field.
	Competency: Repair technicians feel equipped and confident thanks to your training and manuals.
	Efficiency: The time taken to diagnose and repair hardware issues decreases through better documentation and processes.
	Innovation: Your research leads to hardware modifications that directly benefit our business users.


What we can offer you


	Culture - We put our people first and prioritize the well-being of every team member. We&rsquo;ve built a company where all opinions carry weight and where all voices are heard. We value and respect each other and always look out for one another. Above all, we are human.
	Learning - We have a learning and development-focused environment with an emphasis on knowledge sharing, training, and regular internal technical talks.
	Compensation - You&rsquo;ll receive an attractive salary, pension, health insurance, annual bonus, plus other benefits.


What to expect in the hiring process


	A preliminary phone call with the recruiter.
	An interview with the Hiring Team.
	An interview with a member of our Executive team.

Hardware Engineer Job at Moniepoint




        
    

        
        Moniepoint Incorporated is a global business payments and banking platform and recently became QED Investors’ first investment in Africa. We are the partner of choice for over 600,000 businesses of all sizes, powering the dreams of SMBs and providing them with equal access to the tools they need to grow and scale.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Hardware Engineer

Job Location: Abuja

Job Purpose
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The Hardware Engineer ensures that our physical touchpoints—our POS terminals—are reliable, innovative, and always ready to serve our users.
	You’ll be responsible for the full hardware lifecycle, from designing circuit boards to empowering our repair technicians with the mastery they need to keep our fleet running.
	You are the link between complex electronics and the everyday business owners who depend on them.


Key Responsibilities


	Design & Innovation: Create electronic hardware circuits and PCB layouts that meet our high standards for performance and reliability.
	Product Mastery: Maintain and update the technical "source of truth" for our designs, including parts lists and bills of materials.
	Empower Others: Develop training and procedures that help our repair technicians work with precision and speed.
	Continuous Improvement: Create and update repair manuals that make complex fixes feel simple.
	Rigorous Testing: Conduct hands-on testing of products and tools, identifying design gaps and recommending modifications to make our hardware even better.
	Strategic Research: Analyse hardware specifications and market trends to determine the feasibility of new designs or modifications.
	Documentation: Keep detailed, accurate records of repair processes and results to help us learn from every issue identified.
	Collaborate: Work closely with technicians and other engineers to ensure our hardware strategy is aligned across the team.


Qualifications


	A Degree in Electrical / Electronics Engineering or a related field (or equivalent practical experience).
	3-5 years of experience as a hardware/electronics engineer
	Experience in terminal or electronics repair is a strong advantage.
	Strong analytical skills—you enjoy connecting the dots and solving puzzles.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office applications for documentation and tracking.
	Excellent attention to detail; you take pride in accuracy and keeping things tidy.
	A proactive, solution-oriented approach—you don't wait for instructions to make things better.


About you


	You're a Problem Solver: You enjoy the "how" and "why" behind hardware and love making things work.
	You're a Teacher: You enjoy sharing your knowledge and helping technicians grow their skills.
	You're Driven by Mastery: You don't settle for "good enough" and are always looking for ways to improve quality and efficiency.
	You're Human: You communicate clearly and treat your teammates with respect, regardless of their role.


What success looks like


	Reliability: Our hardware designs are stable, and POS terminals have high uptime in the field.
	Competency: Repair technicians feel equipped and confident thanks to your training and manuals.
	Efficiency: The time taken to diagnose and repair hardware issues decreases through better documentation and processes.
	Innovation: Your research leads to hardware modifications that directly benefit our business users.


What we can offer you


	Culture - We put our people first and prioritize the well-being of every team member. We’ve built a company where all opinions carry weight and where all voices are heard. We value and respect each other and always look out for one another. Above all, we are human.
	Learning - We have a learning and development-focused environment with an emphasis on knowledge sharing, training, and regular internal technical talks.
	Compensation - You’ll receive an attractive salary, pension, health insurance, annual bonus, plus other benefits.


What to expect in the hiring process


	A preliminary phone call with the recruiter.
	An interview with the Hiring Team.
	An interview with a member of our Executive team.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Web Designer",
  "description": "TransitEdge Solutions Limited is a results-driven digital marketing agency dedicated to helping businesses grow through strategic innovation and data-backed solutions. We specialize in creating impactful digital experiences that enhance brand visibility, drive engagement, and deliver measurable results. By combining creativity with cutting-edge technology, we position our clients ahead of the competition in an ever-evolving digital landscape.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Web Designer

Job Location: Lagos&nbsp;

Summary


	We are looking for a talented Web Designer to create amazing user experiences.
	The ideal candidate should have an eye for clean and artful web design.
	They should also have superior user interface design skills
	The successful candidate will be able to translate high-level requirements into interaction flows and artifacts.
	They will be able to transform them into beautiful, intuitive, and functional designs.


Responsibilities


	Execute all visual design stages from concept to final hand-off to engineering
	Conceptualize original website design ideas that bring simplicity and user friendliness to complex roadblocks
	Create wireframes, storyboards, user flows, process flows and site maps to communicate interaction and design ideas
	Present and defend designs and key deliverables to peers and executive level stakeholders
	Establish and promote design guidelines, best practices and standards.


Requirements


	BSc / MSc Degree in Human-Computer Interaction, Interaction Design or a Visual Arts subject
	Proven work experience as a Web Designer
	Demonstrable graphic design skills with a strong portfolio
	Solid experience in creating wireframes, storyboards, user flows, process flows and site maps
	Proficiency in Photoshop, Illustrator or other visual design and wire-framing tools
	Proficiency in HTML, CSS and JavaScript for rapid prototyping
	Experience working in an Agile/Scrum development process
	Excellent visual design skills with sensitivity to user-system interaction
	Ability to solve problems creatively and effectively
	Up-to-date with the latest Web trends, techniques and technologies.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: hr.transitedgeltd@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Web Designer Job at TransitEdge Solutions Limited




        
    

        
        TransitEdge Solutions Limited is a results-driven digital marketing agency dedicated to helping businesses grow through strategic innovation and data-backed solutions. We specialize in creating impactful digital experiences that enhance brand visibility, drive engagement, and deliver measurable results. By combining creativity with cutting-edge technology, we position our clients ahead of the competition in an ever-evolving digital landscape.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Web Designer

Job Location: Lagos 

Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are looking for a talented Web Designer to create amazing user experiences.
	The ideal candidate should have an eye for clean and artful web design.
	They should also have superior user interface design skills
	The successful candidate will be able to translate high-level requirements into interaction flows and artifacts.
	They will be able to transform them into beautiful, intuitive, and functional designs.


Responsibilities


	Execute all visual design stages from concept to final hand-off to engineering
	Conceptualize original website design ideas that bring simplicity and user friendliness to complex roadblocks
	Create wireframes, storyboards, user flows, process flows and site maps to communicate interaction and design ideas
	Present and defend designs and key deliverables to peers and executive level stakeholders
	Establish and promote design guidelines, best practices and standards.


Requirements


	BSc / MSc Degree in Human-Computer Interaction, Interaction Design or a Visual Arts subject
	Proven work experience as a Web Designer
	Demonstrable graphic design skills with a strong portfolio
	Solid experience in creating wireframes, storyboards, user flows, process flows and site maps
	Proficiency in Photoshop, Illustrator or other visual design and wire-framing tools
	Proficiency in HTML, CSS and JavaScript for rapid prototyping
	Experience working in an Agile/Scrum development process
	Excellent visual design skills with sensitivity to user-system interaction
	Ability to solve problems creatively and effectively
	Up-to-date with the latest Web trends, techniques and technologies.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.
